Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Sep-08-2025 Continued To Sep-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution, Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-07-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 27, 2021 is admitted to probate. Kim Chi Tran is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for July 7, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Shirkey Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Continued To May-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
